description: Accounts in Ladino and western Arabic numerals. The dating is likely 16th-century based on the paleography and mention of Ottoman sulṭānī currency. The second entry mentions a transaction involving Yaʿaqov Ḥason. There may be another full name mentioned in the fourth entry, but the second part is quite damaged: Avraham Ari..[...] MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בLadino. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
